pains.name: Pipeline drift for founder-sam
pains.description: MarkOS Docs-first brief for founder-sam. Ship the CLI, API, and MCP pipeline with contracts, webhooks, and an audit step. This agent is Grounded in your first-party data with human approval. Use social proof so the operator keeps agency without drift. Direct, quietly confident copy with restraint, precision, and data-dense proof. evidence_grounding_002. Keep every claim in bounds.
